Logomaro — React + Vite + TypeScript logo generator for DeFi/crypto brand marks. Features 30 hand-crafted SVG logos (static + animated), AI-driven logo generation via Puter.js, procedural random logo engine (new logo every 5s), filterable grid (All/Static/Dynamic/AI Gen), SVG copy-to-clipboard, and pause/play controls. Built with React 19, Framer Motion, Zustand, Tailwind CSS v4, and Vitest.
